description_long: This bungalow features a rustic stone exterior with a prominent gable roof covered in weathered, overlapping shingles. The front facade is defined by a large arched doorway with a multi-pane window, framed by the textured stonework. The rear side displays a circular window set high in the wall, adding architectural interest. Both lateral sides have two rectangular windows each, symmetrically placed and trimmed in white, providing natural light to the interior. The roof has deep eaves with visible wooden rafters, and the structure sits on a green base, suggesting a lawn or garden setting. The overall design is compact and single-storied, typical of traditional bungalows found in suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story stone bungalow with a gable roof, arched front door, and symmetrical side windows. The design is rustic and compact, with a circular rear window and deep roof eaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched doorway and stone facade under a gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view with two rectangular windows and the shingled roof visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a circular window set in the stone wall beneath the gable.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with two rectangular windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical side windows with a single arched front door and circular rear window
